description: CompositionBlack round neck cotton t-shirt, with short sleeves, graphic print on the chest, branding on left sleeve and slogan on back neckFit ComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking/remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryFlaunt your craze for cricket and pride in the Indian cricket team with this nike t-shirt. The serious graphic of the spirit of the Indian cricketer speaks volumes of your trust in the men in Blue. Team this t-shirt with smart casuals and wear it to all sporting arenas and casual outings.
